title: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
company: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital South Asia Partners!
